title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 03 Consultant Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has issued the official notification for the recruitment of 03 Consultant Jobs. Candidates who have completed their  MD/ MS, DNB can apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here we provide more information about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If yo...
